purpose: Runtime extraction path when IXP/Document Understanding is unavailable or not yet activated for Agent Builder.

EvidenceArtifact.source_hash: hash of synthetic fixture document content

EvidenceMapping.source_span: source_span from the supporting extracted field
EvidenceMapping.confidence: field confidence unless human override exists
EvidenceMapping.needs_human_review: true for confidence < 0.82, contradiction, or clinical assertion requiring attestation

fallback_behavior: Read only synthetic fixture documents from fixture:// sources or repo-local sample files.
Extract deterministic field labels with source spans: source_uri, section_label, line numbers when available, char offsets when available, and a short excerpt.
Preserve per-field confidence and aggregate confidence; never silently promote low confidence to found.
Return extraction_method fallback_parser so later IXP outputs can swap behind the same shared schemas.
Route low-confidence or contradictory fields to human_exception_review or the relevant clinical validation task.
prohibited_behavior: No real patient, payer, provider, credential, or PHI data.
No manual clinical assertion without source evidence, policy citation, or human approval.
No IXP project creation, upload, delete, publish, or prompt mutation without explicit approval.
